data.body: NOTE (path update 2026-04-23): Brainstorm SKILL.md no longer invokes `sprint-list-epics.sh --max-children=0` and `--min-children=1 --without-tag=brainstorm:complete` as two separate calls — replaced by a single `sprint-list-epics.sh --brainstorm` composite flag. If this ticket's sweep includes brainstorm's epic-selection snippet, the new single-call form is the canonical reference.
